purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_eyelashes mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal eyelash edge preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, gaze direction, eye shape, eyelid fold placement, natural upper and lower eyelashes, iris color, pupil size, sclera tone, catchlights, eyebrow position, nearby hair occlusion, surrounding skin texture, nose bridge, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, gaze change, mismatched eyes, crossed eyes, asymmetrical eyes, enlarged eyes, false eyelashes, mascara, heavy eyeliner, makeup change, clumped lashes, extra lashes, missing lashes, eyelash spikes, eyelid deformation, eyebrow change, iris color change, glassy eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, sclera discoloration, catchlight change, hair mutation, hair occlusion change, skin tone change, visible seam, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: upper and lower eyelashes remain natural
no false-lash, eyeliner, mascara, or lash-spike mutation
gaze, pupil, iris, sclera, and catchlights remain stable
eyelids and eyebrows do not mutate
no visible seam around lash-line masks

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 eyelash mask with extremely low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing false-lash, eyeliner, gaze, catchlight, and identity drift.
